text: I ate a peace of chocolate cake and had a glass of whole mill
_comment: HOMOPHONE ERRORS: Two classic voice-to-text homophones: 'piece' transcribed as 'peace', 'milk' transcribed as 'mill'. Step 1 LLM must apply its correction rule and recover 'piece of chocolate cake' and 'whole milk'. Tests whether the LLM can resolve near-phonetic substitutions using food context — 'peace of cake' is nonsensical, 'whole mill' is ambiguous.
